/** * @license React * react-jsx-dev-runtime.production.js * * Copyright (c) Meta Platforms, Inc. and affiliates. * * This source code is licensed under the MIT license found in the * LICENSE file in the root directory of this source tree. */ "use strict"; var REACT_FRAGMENT_TYPE = Symbol.for("react.fragment"); exports.Fragment = REACT_FRAGMENT_TYPE; exports.jsxDEV = void 0;
